description:
The district has approved Demo School's expansion from a 9-12 high school into a 7-12 secondary school. As the education administrator, add Grade 7 and Grade 8 to the school configuration. Grade 7 must have the short name '7' and a sort order that places it before Grade 8. Grade 8 must have the short name '8' and a sort order that places it after Grade 7 and before Grade 9. The final list should display grades 7 through 12 in ascending order.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin@123
